Are you going in a circle?

Here we are, it’s Christmas Eve

Whoops

Pete, Kath and Annie over, as per Christmas Eve tradtition

And the girls are dancing

the girls are dancing

and Ben wants to join in

c’mon Ben

c’mon Jess, grab Bo-bo’s hand

Merry Christmas Pete and Kath

Hold hands with your sisters

Hi Annie

Hi

In a circle, yes

There
